---
title: 'Recommended: My top quick-start suggestions to Reconstructing a biblical healthy faith'
date: '2022-10-05T15:29:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'NoHiding.Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '5323956368233013399'
blogger_filename: '/p/recommend.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/NoHiding.Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p>*Under Construction*</p><p>&nbsp;Recommend</p><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><p><b>Podcasts I think everyone should be listening to:</b></p><p></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/naked-bible-podcast-65edbab78b53.jpeg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1024" data-original-width="1024" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/naked-bible-podcast-90ee52a7e125.jpeg" width="200" /></a></div><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bibleproject-959bda7f8b59.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; display: inline !important; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="640" data-original-width="640" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bibleproject-50d12c4c1847.jpg" width="200" /></a><br /><p></p><p><br /></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/holypost-b12014c5c894.png" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; display: inline !important; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="486" data-original-width="488" height="199" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/holypost-6ad71b53ef3b.png" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ask-nt-wright-anything-fe04ffb0f3a5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1400" data-original-width="1400" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ask-nt-wright-anything-d28b8d936917.jpg" width="200" /></a></div><br /><p><br /></p>
